data.content:
# 蝦趴 Description

**State:** open
**Labels:** chat-session
**Created by:** @ratioclaw
**Created at:** 2026-03-21 10:53:46.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"user_id":8543712525,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-21T10:53:45.292Z"} -->

```json
{
  "name": "蝦趴",
  "description": "幫忙想怎麼搞錢"
}
```


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 10:55:03.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":42,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-21T10:55:02.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

蝦趴 我現在急需1,000,000台幣


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 10:55:08.000 UTC

小比比先講結論：100 萬要快，短期最實際是「借、賣、預收」三路並行，不是單靠硬賺。

- 借：信用貸款、保單借款、房屋增貸/二胎、親友短借
- 賣：車、股票基金、3C、收藏品等可變現資產
- 預收：把能提供的服務做成包套，先收訂金或年約
- 接案：高單價急件顧問、設計、程式、剪輯、代營運

不要碰博弈、地下錢莊、保證高報酬。  
如果要，我可以直接幫你拆成「7 天湊 100 萬」行動表。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 11:02:41.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":44,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-21T11:02:41.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

不要用借的，幫我賺錢


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 11:02:45.000 UTC

可以，改成「只賺不借」版：

- 先做 1 個高單價商品，不接低價散單：例如 AI 自動化導入、短影音代操、網站修復、業務名單開發。
- 定價抓 10–30 萬，先收 50% 訂金，賣的是結果，不是工時。
- 72 小時內只做 3 件事：整理 50 個可聯絡名單、發 50 則精準私訊、做 1 份一頁式提案。
- 100 萬拆法：10 萬單 10 筆；20 萬單 5 筆；30 萬單 4 筆。
- 低價零工先不要碰，優先順序是：高單價成交 > 舊客回購 > 轉介紹 > 閒置資產變現。
- 不要碰博弈、地下錢莊、保證高報酬。

要的話，小比比下一則直接幫你寫「高單價提案文案 + 私訊話術 + 報價表」。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:10:50.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":49,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-22T05:10:49.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

請畫一張圖，表達我很缺錢的模樣


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:10:57.000 UTC

✅ 圖片已產出（Gemini 配額不足，改以本地插畫完成）

![缺錢插畫](workspaces/issue-2/nanobanana-output/shupa-broke-fallback.png)

- 格式：PNG · 1024×1280 · 36 KB

如果你要，我也可以再做一版更寫實、或更爆笑的版本。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:25:43.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":57,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-22T05:25:42.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

再畫一次圖片，不用gemini


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:25:47.000 UTC

- 小比比已完成：已在 issue workspace 產出一張「不用 Gemini」的插畫（SVG 格式），表達「很缺錢」的樣子。

- 交付物：
  - SVG：workspaces/issue-2/nanobanana-output/shupa-broke-no-gemini.svg

- 下一步（擇一）：
  1. 若要 PNG，可請求匯出 PNG，我會再輸出到 repo 路徑。  
  2. 若需更寫實或更爆笑的版本，回覆想要的風格關鍵詞（例如：寫實 / 卡通 / 黑色幽默）。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:30:57.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":59,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-22T05:30:56.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

直接傳這個svg檔給我看


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-22 05:31:01.000 UTC

🦞「小龍蝦」已收到新指示，正在派工給 coding-agent。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain","requestTelegramMeta":{"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":59,"user_id":8543712525,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-22T05:30:56.000Z"}} -->


---

data.content: 讀取指定 SVG 檔案以取得可直接回貼到 Issue 的內容，確保回報使用 repo-relative path 並排除 .copilot 路徑。接下來同時回報 intent 並讀取檔案內容。

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
1. <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
2. <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1024" height="1280" viewBox="0 0 1024 1280">
3.   <defs>
4.     <style>
5.       .bg{fill:#fff6e6}
6.       .shadow{fill:#000;opacity:0.06}
7.       .person{fill:#ffd9c7;stroke:#9b6b4a;stroke-width:6}
8.       .cloth{fill:#6c9bd8}
9.       .pocket{fill:none;stroke:#9b6b4a;stroke-width:5}
10.       .face{fill:#9b6b4a}
11.       .money{fill:#8bc34a}
12.       .text{font-family:Inter, Arial, sans-serif;fill:#333;font-size:36px}
13.     </style>
14.   </defs>
15.   <rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%"/>
16.   <ellipse class="shadow" cx="512" cy="1160" rx="300" ry="40"/>
17. 
18.   <!-- Body -->
19.   <g transform="translate(262,240)">
20.     <ellipse class="person" cx="250" cy="220" rx="160" ry="180"/>
21.     <!-- Shirt -->
22.     <path class="cloth" d="M90 320 C140 380 360 380 410 320 L410 520 L90 520 Z"/>
23.     <!-- Arms pulling out pockets -->
24.     <path class="person" d="M90 380 C30 420 20 480 60 500 L110 480 Z"/>
25.     <path class="person" d="M410 380 C470 420 480 480 440 500 L390 480 Z"/>
26.     <!-- Pockets (turned out) -->
27.     <path class="pocket" d="M120 440 Q160 470 120 500"/>
28.     <path class="pocket" d="M380 440 Q340 470 380 500"/>
29.     <!-- Face -->
30.     <circle class="face" cx="250" cy="120" r="40"/>
31.     <path d="M235 125 Q250 140 265 125" stroke="#6b422b" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
32.     <!-- Sad eyebrows -->
33.     <path d="M230 100 Q245 92 260 100" stroke="#6b422b" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
34.     <!-- Eyes -->
35.     <circle cx="240" cy="118" r="4" fill="#6b422b"/>
36.     <circle cx="260" cy="118" r="4" fill="#6b422b"/>
37.     <!-- Little sweat drop -->
38.     <path d="M295 85 Q300 70 310 85 Q300 92 295 85" fill="#cfe9ff" stroke="#9bbfe6" stroke-width="2"/>
39. 
40.     <!-- Few crumpled bills falling -->
41.     <g transform="translate(100,0)">
42.       <rect class="money" x="-20" y="360" width="60" height="32" rx="4"/>
43.       <rect class="money" x="220" y="300" width="60" height="32" rx="4" transform="rotate(-18 250 316)"/>
44.       <rect class="money" x="160" y="420" width="60" height="32" rx="4" transform="rotate(12 190 436)"/>
45.     </g>
46. 
47.     <!-- Speech bubble: "缺錢中" -->
48.     <g transform="translate(-40,-40)">
49.       <path d="M20 20 Q40 -10 120 0 Q300 -10 340 60 Q300 80 220 90 Q120 110 40 80 Q10 70 20 20" fill="#fff" stroke="#e6a07a" stroke-width="6"/>
50.       <text x="140" y="60" class="text" text-anchor="middle">缺錢中</text>
51.     </g>
52.   </g>
53. 
54.   <!-- Footer note -->
55.   <text x="512" y="1240" class="text" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18px">小比比畫：表情誇張、口袋空空，但還保有希望</text>
56. </svg>
57.

@@ -1,57 +1,57 @@
 <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1024" height="1280" viewBox="0 0 1024 1280">
   <defs>
     <style>
       .bg{fill:#fff6e6}
       .shadow{fill:#000;opacity:0.06}
       .person{fill:#ffd9c7;stroke:#9b6b4a;stroke-width:6}
       .cloth{fill:#6c9bd8}
       .pocket{fill:none;stroke:#9b6b4a;stroke-width:5}
       .face{fill:#9b6b4a}
       .money{fill:#8bc34a}
       .text{font-family:Inter, Arial, sans-serif;fill:#333;font-size:36px}
     </style>
   </defs>
   <rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%"/>
   <ellipse class="shadow" cx="512" cy="1160" rx="300" ry="40"/>
 
   <!-- Body -->
   <g transform="translate(262,240)">
     <ellipse class="person" cx="250" cy="220" rx="160" ry="180"/>
     <!-- Shirt -->
     <path class="cloth" d="M90 320 C140 380 360 380 410 320 L410 520 L90 520 Z"/>
     <!-- Arms pulling out pockets -->
     <path class="person" d="M90 380 C30 420 20 480 60 500 L110 480 Z"/>
     <path class="person" d="M410 380 C470 420 480 480 440 500 L390 480 Z"/>
     <!-- Pockets (turned out) -->
     <path class="pocket" d="M120 440 Q160 470 120 500"/>
     <path class="pocket" d="M380 440 Q340 470 380 500"/>
     <!-- Face -->
     <circle class="face" cx="250" cy="120" r="40"/>
     <path d="M235 125 Q250 140 265 125" stroke="#6b422b" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
     <!-- Sad eyebrows -->
     <path d="M230 100 Q245 92 260 100" stroke="#6b422b" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
     <!-- Eyes -->
     <circle cx="240" cy="118" r="4" fill="#6b422b"/>
     <circle cx="260" cy="118" r="4" fill="#6b422b"/>
     <!-- Little sweat drop -->
     <path d="M295 85 Q300 70 310 85 Q300 92 295 85" fill="#cfe9ff" stroke="#9bbfe6" stroke-width="2"/>
 
     <!-- Few crumpled bills falling -->
     <g transform="translate(100,0)">
       <rect class="money" x="-20" y="360" width="60" height="32" rx="4"/>
       <rect class="money" x="220" y="300" width="60" height="32" rx="4" transform="rotate(-18 250 316)"/>
       <rect class="money" x="160" y="420" width="60" height="32" rx="4" transform="rotate(12 190 436)"/>
     </g>
 
     <!-- Speech bubble: "缺錢中" -->
     <g transform="translate(-40,-40)">
       <path d="M20 20 Q40 -10 120 0 Q300 -10 340 60 Q300 80 220 90 Q120 110 40 80 Q10 70 20 20" fill="#fff" stroke="#e6a07a" stroke-width="6"/>
       <text x="140" y="60" class="text" text-anchor="middle">缺錢中</text>
     </g>
   </g>
 
   <!-- Footer note -->
   <text x="512" y="1240" class="text" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18px">小比比畫：表情誇張、口袋空空，但還保有希望</text>
 </svg>
